source.description: podatki.gov.pl Twój e-PIT 2024 — skala podatkowa. ZUS: 13.71% employee. Work costs: 3,000 PLN. Tax-free: 30,000 PLN.

description: Under 26, 70,000 PLN gross, employed, 2024 — ulga dla młodych (PIT-zero)

source.description: podatki.gov.pl ulga dla młodych — income below 85,528 PLN and age < 26 → PIT = 0

notes: Income 70,000 < limit 85,528 and age 24 < 26. PIT = 0. ZUS and health insurance still apply.

description: Single employee, 180,000 PLN gross, 2024 — second bracket (32%) applies

source.description: podatki.gov.pl — second bracket 32% above 120,000 PLN. ZUS capped at 208,050 PLN for emerytalne/rentowe but uncapped for chorobowe.

notes: ZUS employee: ~24,678 PLN (high due to uncapped chorobowe). Tax base = 180,000−24,678−3,000 = 152,322. Tax = 10,800 + (152,322−120,000)×32% = 10,800+10,343 = 21,143. 32% bracket applies.

source.description: ZUS official rates 2024: emerytalne 9.76%, rentowe 1.5%, chorobowe 2.45% — total employee 13.71%

description: 2 children, 65,000 PLN gross, married, 2024 — ulga na dzieci reduces tax

source.description: podatki.gov.pl ulga na dzieci 2024: 1,112.04 PLN per child per year

notes: Without ulga: 2,771. With ulga na dzieci (2×1,112.04 = 2,224.08): tax = max(0, 2,771−2,224) = 547. Checking income_tax <= 2,771 (no increase from baseline).
